title: IDX Swing Trading Dashboard
summary: A working VPA-driven swing-trading dashboard for the Indonesia Stock Exchange — accumulation detection, broker-flow tracking, and risk-managed entries, built solo across off-season weekends.
description: A multi-strategy screener and dashboard for IDX swing trading, built during weekend sessions across PwC's slow months. The core VPA (Volume-Price Analysis) engine detects accumulation using ADL slope, volume quality ratio, and Wyckoff phase classification — surfacing a confidence-scored verdict per ticker rather than raw indicator soup. Includes a broker-flow scraper for tracking big-player activity, a Position Health Panel for managing open trades, and switchable strategies (VPA, Reversal, Breakout, Momentum).
impact: Real, working trading tool used on live IDX data — not a concept or mockup.

caseStudy.context: Needed a disciplined, repeatable approach to IDX stock selection beyond tips and gut feel — the anti-thesis of chasing hype tickers.
caseStudy.role: Designed and built the VPA scoring engine, broker-flow scraper, Position Health Panel, and multi-strategy screener UI solo, end-to-end.
caseStudy.outcome: A daily-use personal tool for systematic swing-trade evaluation, built and iterated entirely during off-season weekends.

note: Private repository — reach out if you'd like to discuss the approach.

title: Hyperliquid Copy-Trading Bot
summary: A live-execution-hardened copy-trading bot for Hyperliquid perpetuals, built through a month of weekend sessions with dry-run defaults and confirmation gates.
description: A copy-trading bot for Hyperliquid perpetual futures, built over roughly a month of weekend sessions through sequential AI-assisted prompting. Mirrors target wallet positions with configurable sizing, defaults to dry-run mode, and requires explicit confirmation gates before any live order leaves the sandbox — a deliberate guardrail given it touches real funds. Terminal-only; no UI.
impact: Hardened a side project to a live-execution-safe state, with dry-run defaults and confirmation gates before any real trade.

caseStudy.context: Wanted to test how far AI-assisted, prompt-driven development could go on something with real financial risk attached, not just a toy script.
caseStudy.role: Built the wallet-mirroring logic, sizing, dry-run mode, and confirmation gates through iterative prompting, end-to-end.
caseStudy.outcome: A working, safety-gated copy-trading bot, built in about a month of weekend sessions.

note: Terminal-only — no public demo. Reach out if you'd like to discuss the approach.

title: AI for Finance - PwC Project for Banking Client (2025)
summary: Built PySpark pipelines on Cloudera/Hive to preprocess 1M+ monthly banking transactions across 5,000+ branches for financial trend analysis.
description: Built and maintained PySpark pipelines on Cloudera/Hive to preprocess 1M+ monthly transaction records across 5,000+ branches for branch-level financial trend analysis. Focused on data quality checks, feature preparation, and validation aligned with business rules in a regulated environment, with unit tests covering core pipeline components. Supported downstream analytics and ML workflows with reliable, scalable inputs.
impact: Processed and validated 1M+ monthly contract records across 5,000+ branches on Cloudera/Hive to support ML-driven branch analysis.

caseStudy.context: Banking finance analytics needed consistent, high-quality features from raw contract data.
caseStudy.role: Built PySpark pipelines, data prep, and validation aligned to business rules.
caseStudy.outcome: Reliable, scalable data foundation for branch-level financial trend analysis.

title: IoT-Based Garden Monitoring & Maintenance System
summary: Unified irrigation and hydroponics with sensor-driven monitoring, automation, and mobile control.
description: Designed an IoT system that connects sensor nodes, Raspberry Pi controllers, Firebase, and a Flutter mobile app for remote garden monitoring. Implemented real-time data capture, automated irrigation and nutrient dosing, and alert notifications.
impact: Integrated hardware, cloud, and mobile into one reliable IoT system.

caseStudy.context: Remote garden maintenance required real-time sensing and automated watering/nutrient control.
caseStudy.role: Built hardware integration (Raspberry Pi/Arduino), Firebase backend, and Flutter app.
caseStudy.outcome: End-to-end system for monitoring, alerts, and remote control.

title: Promosee - Influencer Recommendation Platform (Bangkit Academy Capstone 2023)
summary: Matched SMEs with influencers using content-based recommendations and sentiment signals on a cloud backend.
description: Built a cloud-native influencer recommendation platform that matches SMEs with relevant creators by product category and campaign goals. Integrated a content-based recommender and BERT-based sentiment analysis behind a FastAPI service on Cloud Run. Used Firestore for storing influencer and campaign data.
impact: Deployed a recommender API with sentiment scoring on Cloud Run.

caseStudy.context: Small businesses needed data-driven influencer matching by product category and campaign goals.
caseStudy.role: Implemented FastAPI service, integrated recommender and BERT sentiment components, wired Firestore.
caseStudy.outcome: Cloud-native platform enabling searchable, ranked influencer recommendations.

title: To-Be Enterprise Architecture Design - Manufacturing (Mulia Box)
summary: Mapped business, data, app, and tech layers to improve manufacturing process clarity.
description: Designed a To-Be enterprise architecture covering business, data, application, and technology layers for a manufacturing workflow. Conducted stakeholder analysis, value stream mapping, and BPMN modeling to clarify processes and dependencies.
impact: Created To-Be architecture artifacts across business, data, app, and tech layers.

caseStudy.context: Manufacturing operations needed aligned processes, data entities, and application support.
caseStudy.role: Led stakeholder analysis, BPMN modeling, data/entity design, and gap analysis.
caseStudy.outcome: Clear target architecture to guide quality control and cross-division alignment.

title: BudgetBuddies - Fintech & Financial Literacy Mobile Prototype
summary: Designed a budgeting and financial-literacy mobile concept for Bank Mandiri's My Digital Academy program.
description: Designed a fintech and financial literacy mobile prototype for Bank Mandiri's My Digital Academy program. Mapped user journeys and defined features that encourage budgeting habits and spending awareness for teenagers.
impact: Defined user journeys and feature set for a fintech learning prototype.

caseStudy.context: Students needed simple tools to build budgeting habits and spending awareness.
caseStudy.role: Produced user journey maps, feature definitions, and system documentation.
caseStudy.outcome: Documented product concept and scope for a financial literacy prototype.

title: CPU & GPU Recommendation API - Backend System Design
summary: Built a secured API that recommends CPU/GPU combos by budget and brand constraints.
description: Designed a backend API that recommends CPU and GPU combinations based on budget and brand preferences. Implemented benchmark-based scoring to avoid bottlenecks and exposed secured REST endpoints with JWT authentication.
impact: Designed benchmark-based scoring to prevent bottlenecks.

caseStudy.context: Users struggle to pick balanced PC parts within a fixed budget.
caseStudy.role: Designed recommendation logic, REST endpoints, and JWT-secured access.
caseStudy.outcome: Working backend with MongoDB data store and constraint-aware recommendations.
